content.en:
Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian's ninth transformation has finally ushered in.

Rumble!!!!

The Dragon Scale Myth Body has completely completed the ninth metamorphosis, reaching the limit of the Myth Body's transformation, and this Mythology Body can no longer continue to improve.

Then, the other mythical bodies also completed the ninth metamorphosis one by one.

After a period of time, his eighteen supreme mythical bodies had all completed their ninth transformation, and their strength had skyrocketed.

In order to reach the peak of the Mythical Dao Realm, the eighteen supreme Mythical Bodies have reached the ninth transformation, and he has reached the extreme of the Mythical Dao Realm.

"With my current strength, I may not be weaker than the First Demon Venerable!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he did not immediately proceed to the Eternal Dao, and he was going to consult the First Elder.

The First Elder had already undergone Eternal Dao Transformation, so he naturally had to ask for more advice and a thorough understanding before he began to cultivate.

......

Hall of the Senate.

Ye Tian came here to meet the first elder.

"Ye Tian, what are you looking for me?"

The First Elder asked.

Ye Tian got straight to the point and said: "First Elder, I want to ask for advice on how to go on the road above the Mythical Dao Realm, I only know that it is to be eternal to Dao, and I don't know anything else!"

The First Elder asked suspiciously, "What are you asking about now, could it be that you have reached the limit of the Mythical Dao Realm, and all the Mythical Bodies have completed the ninth transformation?"

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian showed the aura of the ninth transformation of the eighteen mythical bodies, and his terrifying aura made the first elder tremble.

In his eyes, Ye Tian was not even weaker than him.

"Okay, great!"

The First Patriarch was not jealous, but excited.

With Ye Tian's assistance, he was not afraid of the First Demon Venerable.

However, he quickly calmed down and introduced to Ye Tian: "After the mythical Dao realm is the eternal Dao realm, comprehend the rules of the eternal sequence to the Dao, and after the whole body is ten percent eternal to the Dao, the conditions for breakthrough will be met, but it is extremely difficult to really break through." And the Gu Yuan Fruit is the only treasure that can make the Eternal Dao Transformation quickly completed, the first Demon Venerable wanted to capture the Gu Yuan Fruit, once he succeeded, he would be able to complete the whole body within tens of millions of Eternal Dao Realm, even if he did not succeed in impacting the Eternal Dao Realm, his strength was far beyond our thoughts. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood a little.

Immediately, he asked, "I am following the path of the Supreme Strength and the Dao, and I have superimposed eighteen kinds of Supreme Divine Bodies, if I want to carry out the Eternal Enlightenment, will there be any difference?"

"If there is a difference, it is that it is more difficult, but every time you complete the Eternal Dao, the strength will increase more. I and the First Demon Venerable are both Eternal Daoist with three percent of our bodies, but his strength is much stronger than mine. If it weren't for the innate primordial treasures that increased the strength of many increases, I wouldn't have been able to hold up ten moves at all. "The First Elder Dao.

After talking with the First Elder for a long time, Ye Tian knew that there were three difficulties in the Eternal Dao Transformation.

The first difficulty is to start the Eternal Dao Transformation, and the top ten Patriarchs in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance have all reached the extreme of the Mythical Dao Realm, but they just can't carry out the Eternal Dao Transformation.

The second difficulty is that Sancheng is eternal to Taoism, which is a small bottleneck.

The First Demon Venerable and the First Elder had been trapped in this step for an infinite number of years before, and they had only recently broken through.

The third difficulty is the Seventy Percent Eternal Dao, once you cross the Seventy Percent Eternal Dao, you can upgrade to ten percent Eternal Dao.

Of course, ten percent of the Eternal Dao and the Eternal Sequence Dao rules are just the conditions for impacting the Eternal Dao realm, but they may not be able to break through, and the success rate of breaking through is very low.

"First Elder, how do you know that the realm behind you is the Eternal Dao Realm in the Void Realm?"

Ye Tian asked.

The First Elder said: "There may be an eternal Dao realm, or maybe there is not." In fact, the First Demon Venerable and I were the embodiment of a mysterious Eternal Supreme Dao realm, and the first Demon Venerable Demon Gu was actually a demon vine, which was transformed into the first Supreme Dao Void Demon after being ignited by that mysterious eternal supreme Dao realm. And my body is actually the Innate Origin Boundary Stone, which was transformed into a creature by the other party, so I will protect the Innate Origin Domain. "

"That's what happened!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The First Elder said, "After that mysterious Eternal Dao realm power enlightened us, he left some inheritance information. Perhaps, only after we have broken through to the Eternal Dao Realm can we understand the true truth. Of course, in these endless years, I also have some guesses, the Ancient Abyss Realm should have some connection with the place where the mysterious Eternal Dao Realm is located, but unfortunately we can't go to that place through the Ancient Abyss Realm. Second, the Mythical Valley, this place is very special, and it may contain secrets inside, but the core of the Mythical Valley has an incomparably terrifying mythical spirit, which may be comparable to the Eternal Dao Realm. Perhaps, there is a hidden truth. "

Ye Tian also knew the mythical spirit in the middle of the Mythical Valley, he had been there, and the other party had killed him with a look.

Therefore, he has not been there again, because the difference in strength is too big, and he is not even qualified to drag the other party.

After Ye Tian discussed with the First Elder for a long time, he returned to the Human Domain.

He began to prepare for the Eternal Dao.

Of course, if he relied on himself, he would definitely not be able to carry out eternal enlightenment.

However, there are a variety of mythical spirits in him that contribute to eternity and enlightenment.

Ye Tian took out a mythical spiritual object, the mythical Xuanteng, and after grinding the mythical Xuanteng into powder, he swallowed it and used it to refine his body and carry out eternity and Taoism.

Moreover, he also cultivated with the help of the Divine Qiongzhu and a variety of innate primordial treasures that were helpful for cultivation, although the effect of these innate primordial treasures was not very good, but at least it could still increase some cultivation speed.

Time passed slowly, and a mythical enticum was about to be consumed.

this day.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's body finally began to become eternal to Dao.

In an instant, the eighteen supreme mythical bodies he had cultivated began to merge at the same time as they were becoming eternally supreme, as if they were about to merge into an eternal mythical body.

However, this is only a preliminary integration.

After a long time, his body completed a point of eternal enlightenment.

Although it was only the beginning of the Eternal Dao, there were a variety of mythical spirits on him, and the speed of progress would definitely be very fast.

The years passed.

Unconsciously, with the help of a piece of mythical spiritual objects, Ye Tian's eternal Taoism reached the realm of Yicheng.

At this time, his strength has far surpassed the past.

"The First Demon Venerable should not be my opponent anymore!"

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

After all, his current Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules had reached the realm of fifty percent.
